title: Hearing notice for 1 CCR 201-4
summary: Given recent developments regarding the COVID-19 virus, the Department has decided to cancel the public rulemaking hearing. A new rulemaking hearing will be scheduled at a later time. When a new hearing is scheduled, the Department will provide notice to interested parties in accordance with section 24-4-103(3) and (4), C.R.S. Written comments submitted pursuant to the February 14, 2020 notice will be made part of the record for the rescheduled hearing.
